MAY 19 PRIMARY ELECTION UNOFFICIAL RESULTS
FAYETTE COUNTY ACT 88 REPORT
In accordance with the reporting requirements of Act 88 of 2022, Fayette County received a total of 6,189 mail-in and absentee ballots by 8 PM on the day of the May 19, 2026 Primary Election.
Empty heading
Attention Voters -- IMPORTANT!
Precinct Changes for May 19 Primary
Markleysburg Borough
is temporarily moved to
Markleysburg-Henry Clay VFD
100 Fireman Drive
Markleysburg, PA 15459
THE FOLLOWING PRECINCTS HAVE BEEN CONSOLIDATED
Brownsville Borough
Precincts 1 (Southside Fire) and 3 (South Hills Terrace) are consolidated as Precinct 1; vote at Southside Fire Station 530 Water Street, Brownsville PA 15417
Connellsville City
Precincts 2 (Sr. Center) and 3 (Community Center) are consolidated as Precinct 2; vote at Connellsville Senior Center McCormick Ave. Entrance, 100 East Fayette St., Connellsville, PA 15425
------
Precinct 4 (New Haven Hose) boundaries and location to stay same but re-numbered as Precinct 3
German Township
Precincts 1 (McClellandtown) and 3 (Footedale) are consolidated as Precinct 1; vote at McClellandtown Fireman's Social Hall, 102 Blaine Ave., McClellandtown PA 15458
------
​
Precincts 2 (Municipal Bldg.) and 4 (Adah) are consolidated as Precinct 2; vote at German Twp. Municipal Bldg., 2 Long St. Edenborn, McClellandtown PA 15458
Luzerne Township
Precincts 2 (Hiller) and 4 (Allison) are consolidated as Precinct 2; vote at Hiller VFD, 911 First St. Hiller PA 15444
Menallen Township
Precincts 2 (Elem. School) and 3 (New Salem) are consolidated as Precinct 2; vote at Menallen Elementary School, 8 Pedro Drive, Uniontown PA 15401
North Union Township
Precincts 1 (Clark School) and 5 (Valley Sportsmen)
are consolidated as Precinct 1; vote at R.W. Clark Elementary School, 200 Water St., Uniontown PA 15401
Redstone Township
Precincts 1 (Municipal Bldg.) and 3 Colonial #3 Athletic)
are consolidated as Precinct 1; vote at Redstone Twp. Municipal Bldg., 225 Twin Hills Rd., Grindstone PA 15442
------
Precincts 2 (Rec. Center) and 4 (Fairbank Rod & Gun)
are consolidated as Precinct 2; vote at Redstone Twp. Recreation Center, 216 Republic Rd., Republic PA 15475
Uniontown City
Precincts 1 (Community Action) and 2 (City Hall) are consolidated as Precinct 1; vote at Fayette Co. Community Action, 108 North Beeson Blvd., Uniontown PA 15401
------
Precincts 5 (Uniontown HS) and 6 (Mt. Vernon Towers) are consolidated as Precinct 5, and
re-numbered as Precinct 2; vote at Uniontown Area High School Wilson Ave. Entrance; 146 East Fayette St., Uniontown PA 15401
------
Precinct 7 (Ben Franklin School) boundaries and location to stay same
but re-numbered as Precinct 5

OFFICIAL ELECTION NOTICES
2026
PUBLIC NOTICE
LOGIC & ACCURACY TESTING
BEGINS APRIL 27
NOTICE is hereby given by the
Fayette County Election Board that preparation and testing of the voting system
for the May 19, 2026 Primary Election will begin on Monday, April 27, 2026 at 1
PM  at the Fayette County Election
Bureau, 2 West Main Street, Uniontown PA 15401. Testing will continue each day
thereafter from 9 AM until 4 PM until all testing is complete. Each Political
Party within the county may have one representative at the above test.
A public test of the central scanners
for May 19, 2026 Primary Election will be held on Monday, May 4, 2026,
beginning at 1 PM, at the above location.
Fayette County Board of
Elections

Campaign Finance Information
IMPORTANT INFORMATION FOR CANDIDATES & THE PUBLIC
CAMPAIGN FINANCE
Local and County candidates and committees must file campaign finance reports on paper at the Election Bureau, 2 West Main Street Suite 111 in Uniontown in accordance with the state reporting schedule.
State-level candidates who live in Fayette County (and committees supporting them) are also required to file paper copies of their
entire
state reports at the county Election Bureau by the published deadlines (no extensions).
Local and County candidates who have filed waivers do not have to file reports until they receive or spend $250 or more for their campaign, or form a committee, after which all reports must be filed on schedule.
On PA State forms, handbooks, etc. Local and County candidates please substitute the Fayette County Election Bureau for Department of State. Use the state forms but file in Uniontown, not Harrisburg. There is no online filing for Local and County candidates.

Mission Statement
The Fayette County Election Bureau conducts the Primary and General Elections and the Voter Registration process.
We administer the voter registration process as prescribed by legislation maintaining the integrity of the election process.
